name: HWR_GBL_ORG_VL
query: SELECT G.GBL_PRFL_ID AS GBL_PRFL_ID , O.PRFL_ID AS PRFL_ID , G.SOURCE_ID AS SOURCE_ID, O.HWR_ORG_ID AS HWR_ORG_ID , G2.GBL_PRFL_ID AS PRFL_GBL_PRFL_ID FROM HWR_PER_GBL_PRFL_PRFL_X G, HWR_PER_ORG_PRFL_XREF O, HWR_PER_GBL_PRFL_PRFL_X G2 WHERE G.PRFL_ID = O.HWR_ORG_ID AND G2.PRFL_ID = O.PRFL_ID
